calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Agreement Regarding Accounts Of Trustees
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: The Jennifer Egan Family Trust PTR-10-293205; The Laura Kimpton Family Trust PTR-10-293206 and The Graham Kimpton Family Trust PTR-10-293207

Appearances: Ellen Kahn for and with Barry Bunshoft (Trustee).
Philip Spalding Guardian Ad Litem for the Minor Beneficiaries and unborn issue.

The Court expressed concern regarding the Guardian Ad Litem waiving any substantive rights of the Minors. Ms. Kahn provided Trust history, spoke of the agreement between the parties regarding the accountings and waivers of liability, and stated that the reason for the agreement was for their Clients privacy. With respect to the Graham Kimpton trust, Ms. Kahn stated that their are no minors and that the three beneficiaries have signed an agreement approving the accountings. All three Petitions for Approval of Agreement Regarding Accounts of Trustees are taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

Petition For Approval Of Agreement Regarding Accounts Of Trustees
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Agreement Regarding Accounts Of Trustees
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ellen Kahn for Barry Bunshoft and for Robert Bunje.

Ms. Kahn stated that she had previously filed petitions in a similar matter, and that she used the exact same order and followed identical procedures at the request of the Beneficiaries who did not want the accounting before the Court. The Court questioned the language in paragraph three stating that it was slightly different than what was listed in the agreement. The Court granted the petition. The Court will conform the orders.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
